# What changed and why

<!-- One paragraph. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (full suite)
- [ ] Used the local CLI only (`node bin/atlas.js …`) — never the published package against this worktree
- [ ] Commits follow `type(scope): message`, first line only
- [ ] Managed-skill edits (files under `skills/`) are batched with other skill edits in one release and called out in CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Docs/artifacts follow the depersonalized documentation rules in AGENTS.md
